name: UPDORD
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[UPDORD] ON [dbo].[REZERVEDETAY]
FOR INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SIPRZVKUL AS INT
SELECT @SIPRZVKUL=SIPRZVKUL FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK)
IF ISNULL(@SIPRZVKUL,0)>0 
BEGIN

DECLARE @INS_COUNT AS INT  SET @INS_COUNT=ISNULL((select COUNT(*) from INSERTED),0)
DECLARE @DEL_COUNT AS INT  SET @DEL_COUNT=ISNULL((select COUNT(*) from DELETED ),0)

DECLARE @SB_REF AS INT
DECLARE @SMIK AS FLOAT
DECLARE @RMIK AS FLOAT

IF (@INS_COUNT>0 AND @DEL_COUNT>0) OR @INS_COUNT>0
BEGIN
		DECLARE RDETAYcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		select SB_REF from INSERTED GROUP BY SB_REF
		OPEN RDETAYcur;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM RDETAYcur 
		INTO @SB_REF;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			SET @SMIK=ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR) FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=0),0)
			SET @RMIK=ISNULL((SELECT MIKTAR FROM REZERVESB WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF),0)

			IF(@SMIK=@RMIK AND @RMIK>0)
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=1 WHERE RZV<>1 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
			END
			ELSE
			IF(@SMIK>@RMIK AND @RMIK>0)
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=2 WHERE RZV<>2 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
			END			
			ELSE
			IF(@SMIK>0 AND @RMIK=0)
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=0 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF
			END	
		FETCH NEXT FROM RDETAYcur
		INTO @SB_REF;
		END  
		CLOSE RDETAYcur;  
		DEALLOCATE RDETAYcur;
END
ELSE IF (@DEL_COUNT>0 )
BEGIN
		DECLARE RDETAYcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
		select SB_REF from DELETED GROUP BY SB_REF
		OPEN RDETAYcur;  
		FETCH NEXT FROM RDETAYcur 
		INTO @SB_REF;
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
		BEGIN  
			SET @SMIK=ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR-SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR) FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF AND KAPALI=0),0)
			SET @RMIK=ISNULL((SELECT MIKTAR FROM REZERVESB WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF),0)
			
			IF(@SMIK=@RMIK AND @RMIK>0)
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=1 WHERE RZV<>1 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
			END
			ELSE
			IF(@SMIK>@RMIK AND @RMIK>0)
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=2 WHERE RZV<>2 AND SB_REF=@SB_REF
			END			
			ELSE
			IF(@SMIK>0 AND @RMIK=0)
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISFISLERI SET RZV=0 WHERE SB_REF=@SB_REF
			END	
		FETCH NEXT FROM RDETAYcur
		INTO @SB_REF;
		END  
		CLOSE RDETAYcur;  
		DEALLOCATE RDETAYcur;
END
END
